duplicate_research_check: No immutable idea in this fixture batch asks the same cross-timeframe continuation question.
falsifiability_assessment: The conditioned and baseline persistence labels are directly comparable with fixed horizons.
data_readiness_assessment: Both approved Development datasets contain the declared 1h and 4h inputs.
leakage_and_overfit_risks: Overlapping horizons can inflate apparent sample size.
transaction_cost_challenge: Any later executable interpretation would need a separate cost study; this test remains descriptive.
strongest_counterevidence: The four-hour confirmation may arrive after the directional move is exhausted.
alternative_explanations: Volatility persistence rather than trend persistence may explain the label difference.
score_adjustments: Retain a high feasibility score because no new data are required.
